body_transformation: Geodude's rounded head and compact body now feature seamless metallic plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns along its seams, replacing the rocky texture with a smooth gunmetal gray finish. Its short stubby limbs are encased in polished steel armor plates that maintain the original compact stance, while the fist-like arms now display sharp angular knuckles with chrome silver accents. The surface details shift to deep indigo highlights along the mechanical joints and subtle pistons visible at the elbows, enhancing the structural integrity without altering proportions. Glowing blue energy lines trace beneath the reflective surface, adding dynamic depth to the otherwise solid steel composition.
signature_feature: Head plating: seamless gunmetal armor with engraved geometric patterns and deep indigo energy tracing.
